name: Banana Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the banana into the pie shell.
2. Prepare the pie filling according to package directions for instant pudding, using 2.5 cups of milk.
3. Fold in half a cup of the Whipped topping and pour over the banana slices in the shell.
4. Chill at least 3 hours.
5. Top with remaining whipped topping; garnish with banana slices and mint, if desired.
